IsA: It is the symptom of pain in the face, head, or neck.
It is a type of primary headache.
It is a type of secondary headache.
It is a benign, recurrent headache not caused by underlying disease or structural problems.
It is a headache that starts with eye pain, blurry vision, associated with nausea and vomiting.
HasA: It has pulsing head pain, nausea, photophobia and phonophobia.
It has non-pulsing bandlike pressure on both sides of the head.
It has short episodes of severe pain, usually around one eye, with autonomic symptoms.
It has continuous unilateral pain with episodes of severe pain.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by pain in the face, head, or neck.
It is characterized by pulsing head pain, nausea, photophobia and phonophobia.
It is characterized by non-pulsing bandlike pressure on both sides of the head.
It is characterized by short episodes of severe pain, usually around one eye, with autonomic symptoms.
It is characterized by shooting face pain.
UsedFor: It is used for analgesic treatment.
It is used for pain medication.
It is used for treating migraines.
It is used for treating cluster headaches.
It is used for preventing cluster headaches.
LocatedIn: It is located in the face, head, or neck.
CausedBy: It is caused by dehydration.
It is caused by fatigue.
It is caused by sleep deprivation.
It is caused by stress.
It is caused by the effects of medications.
It is caused by viral infections.
It is caused by loud noises.
It is caused by head injury.
It is caused by rapid ingestion of a very cold food or beverage.
It is caused by dental or sinus issues.
Affects: It affects about half of adults in a given year.
It affects about 1.6 billion people.
It affects about 848 million people.
It affects the face.
It affects the head.
It affects the neck.
It affects those with severe headaches with an increased risk of depression.
It affects the eyes.
It affects the ears.
It affects the teeth.
PartOf: It is part of physical discomforts.
It is part of the period after the seizure.
It is part of the cerebral cortex.
It is part of the brainstem.
It is part of the meninges.
KnownFor: It is known for being one of the most commonly experienced of all physical discomforts.
It is known for being a symptom of pain in the face, head, or neck.
It is known for its various types including migraine, tension-type headache, and cluster headache.
It is known for the increased risk of depression in those with severe headaches.
It is known for having more than 200 types.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with migraine.
It is associated with tension-type headache.
It is associated with cluster headaches.
It is associated with depression.
It is associated with dehydration.
It is associated with fatigue.
It is associated with sleep deprivation.
It is associated with stress.
It is associated with the effects of medications.
It is associated with viral infections.
About: It is about pain in the face, head, or neck.
It is about the symptom of pain.
It is about different types of headaches.
It is about the causes of headaches.
It is about the treatment of headaches.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the vascular theory.
Influenced: It influenced the understanding of migraines.
It influenced the development of treatment for migraines.
It influenced the classification of headaches.
It influenced the diagnosis of secondary headaches.
It influenced the study of neurological disorders.
